jokes.text: Why should my tax money pay for art I find offensive?
jokes.setup: Ship is arguing about art funding
jokes.punchline: Conservative talking point delivered by spaceship AI
jokes.explanation: Solid character comedy - unexpected political conservatism from spaceship AI

jokes.text: Would you censor the Venus De Venus just because you can see her spewers?
jokes.setup: Reference to Venus de Milo statue
jokes.punchline: Future version called 'Venus De Venus' with visible 'spewers'
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay combining Venus de Milo with futuristic bodily function reference

jokes.text: Why not create a national endowment for strip clubs... While we're at it? Why not, indeed!
jokes.setup: Ship sarcastically suggests funding strip clubs
jokes.punchline: Bender enthusiastically agrees
jokes.explanation: Good character contrast - Bender's hedonistic agreement to ship's sarcastic suggestion

jokes.text: That ship is so white bread.
jokes.punchline: Robot calling spaceship 'white bread' (bland/conservative)
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective character moment - Bender's casual dismissiveness

jokes.text: Cool! Clothing. Delicious clothing.
jokes.punchline: Bender finds clothing 'delicious'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender character beat - his unusual robot appetite extending to fabric

jokes.text: Romanticorp? Are they a corporation that makes romantic stuff? Very good, Amy.
jokes.setup: Amy asks obvious question about company name
jokes.punchline: Leela's patronizing 'Very good, Amy'
jokes.explanation: Standard Amy-is-ditzy joke with Leela's condescending response

jokes.text: Remember, we've got to show these people... We're not bitter husks of human beings... Who long ago abandoned hope of finding love in this lifetime.
jokes.punchline: Overly specific description of their actual romantic failures
jokes.explanation: Excellent self-aware humor - Leela accidentally revealing their exact situation while trying to hide it

jokes.text: Leela, you'll have to do some acting. Check.
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact 'Check' acknowledging her own poor acting ability
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leela's self-awareness and practicality

jokes.text: Oh, you have got to be kidding. Ow! I mean, that's so sweet. I mean, that's sho shweet.
jokes.setup: Leela's genuine disgust at couple's romance
jokes.punchline: Getting hit and overcorrecting with baby talk
jokes.explanation: Great cringe comedy showing Leela's terrible acting getting progressively worse

jokes.text: Do any of you collect Lovey Bears? I do. Kif's given me dozens.
jokes.punchline: Amy oversharing about relationship with Kif
jokes.explanation: Mild character humor about Amy's oversharing tendency

jokes.text: No. It's actually cheaper... To genetically engineer real ones.
jokes.punchline: Casually mentions genetically engineering real creatures instead
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark turn - casual corporate efficiency leading to horrific implications

jokes.text: They frolic in the Lovey Forest until their first birthday. Then we choose the cuddly-Uddliest ones... And stuff them full of fire-Retardant love fluff.
jokes.punchline: Selecting and killing the cutest ones for stuffing
jokes.explanation: Exceptional dark comedy escalation - turning sweet imagery into horror through corporate cheerfulness

jokes.text: Is heaven missing an angel? Because you've got nice cans.
jokes.punchline: Crude redirect to 'nice cans'
jokes.explanation: Well-executed misdirection taking romantic pickup line in crude direction

jokes.text: My two favorite things are commitment and changing myself.
jokes.punchline: Two contradictory relationship red flags presented as positives
jokes.explanation: Sharp satire of contradictory dating profile clichés

jokes.text: Does that dummy have a brother?
jokes.punchline: Amy attracted to the robot despite/because of terrible lines
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing Amy's questionable taste in men

jokes.text: Letter's like U and R can mean words like 'you' and 'are.'
jokes.punchline: Condescendingly explaining obvious text speak
jokes.explanation: Mild humor from overly explaining simple concept

jokes.text: Here, Leela. 'U- R- 2 cute.' Perhaps. What's your point?
jokes.setup: Fry reading romantic candy heart to Leela
jokes.punchline: Leela's dismissive 'Perhaps. What's your point?'
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamic - Leela's casual dismissal of Fry's romantic gesture

jokes.text: And you got a cage for the lion.
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning they have a caged lion on the ship
jokes.explanation: Excellent throwaway absurdist detail about random dangerous animal on ship

jokes.text: This isn't alternative rock. It's college rock.
jokes.punchline: Pretentious distinction between similar music genres
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Bender's unexpected musical snobbery

jokes.text: Yeah, it was me. It's a cute song. Listen, ship!
jokes.punchline: Calling song 'cute' and addressing Bender flirtatiously
jokes.explanation: Sets up romantic subplot with ship having feminine personality

jokes.text: If you don't like the stations, play with my buttons... Till you find something we both enjoy. Oh, gosh. That came out all wrong. Too late, baby. You said it.
jokes.punchline: Accidental sexual innuendo and Bender pouncing on it
jokes.explanation: Good setup for Bender's character and the ship romance plot

jokes.text: What was that? Maybe we hit a space cow.
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of space cows as traffic hazard
jokes.explanation: Good sci-fi absurdity - treating space fauna as mundane hazard

jokes.text: Cootchie- Cootchie. Stop it. You're mussing up my trajectory.
jokes.punchline: Ship's complaint about trajectory being affected
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy concept - romantic affection affecting ship navigation

jokes.text: It'd be like me dating a really fat lady and living inside her. And she'd be all like:
jokes.setup: Fry trying to understand Bender-ship relationship
jokes.punchline: Grotesque analogy with implied visual of Fry making ship noises
jokes.explanation: Bizarre but effective analogy that's both gross and illuminating

jokes.text: I need a girl with a big 400-Ton booty.
jokes.punchline: Literal interpretation of 'big booty' for spaceship
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay connecting hip-hop slang to spaceship mass

jokes.text: That's what makes it so nasty.
jokes.setup: Leela listing moral objections to the relationship
jokes.punchline: Bender finding the immorality appealing
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender character moment - embracing moral objections as features

jokes.text: That's what makes it so nasty.
jokes.setup: Leela listing why the relationship is wrong
jokes.punchline: Bender treating moral objections as selling points
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender character moment - getting excited about moral transgression

jokes.text: Still, given the chance, I'd give in to urges far more shocking.
jokes.punchline: Admitting she'd do worse things if given the opportunity
jokes.explanation: Good character revelation showing Leela's hidden desires beneath moral posturing

jokes.text: You have much to teach us.
jokes.setup: Bender explaining his callous dating approach
jokes.punchline: Amy treating terrible behavior as wisdom
jokes.explanation: Solid character beat showing Amy's poor judgment in relationships

jokes.text: Oh, wait, you're serious. Let me laugh even harder.
jokes.setup: Leela asking about trust and relationship ethics
jokes.punchline: Bender's escalating dismissive laughter
jokes.explanation: Excellent Bender moment - perfect timing and escalation showing his complete amorality

jokes.text: And to your lady friends, may I say, 'Bam.'
jokes.setup: Elzar greeting Bender and his dates
jokes.punchline: Using his cooking catchphrase as pickup line
jokes.explanation: Good character consistency using Elzar's established catchphrase in romantic context

jokes.text: He's an old- Fashioned, one- Spaceship robot.
jokes.setup: Fry asking if Bender used another ship
jokes.punchline: Ship's naive faith in Bender's monogamy
jokes.explanation: Good dramatic irony - audience knows Bender is cheating while ship remains naive

jokes.text: Yep. Mind- Numbingly interesting. Whoa.
jokes.setup: Ship sharing animal facts about tapirs
jokes.punchline: Bender's sarcastic agreement followed by distraction
jokes.explanation: Standard relationship humor - bored partner's sarcastic responses

jokes.text: Those women you saw me with were my accountants.
jokes.punchline: Obvious lie calling prostitutes 'accountants'
jokes.explanation: Predictable but effective cheating husband cliché

jokes.text: I would dearly love to believe that were true. So I do.
jokes.punchline: Ship consciously choosing to believe despite knowing it's false
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark relationship humor - the willing self-deception of the desperate

jokes.text: No one loves you, because you're tiny and made of meat.
jokes.setup: Leela trying to help ship see Bender's flaws
jokes.punchline: Ship lashing out with specific robotic insults
jokes.explanation: Brilliant robotic perspective insult - 'made of meat' as ultimate putdown

jokes.text: Why does Ross, the largest friend, not simply eat the other five?
jokes.punchline: Logical alien conclusion based on size hierarchy
jokes.explanation: Legendary joke - perfect alien logic applied to human sitcom, became cultural touchstone

jokes.text: Perhaps they are saving that for sweeps.
jokes.setup: Response to Ross eating friends question
jokes.punchline: TV industry insider knowledge from alien
jokes.explanation: Great follow-up showing aliens understand TV programming strategy

jokes.text: This is a Joey-Heavy episode anyway.
jokes.punchline: Alien critic's sophisticated TV analysis
jokes.explanation: Good continuation showing alien's detailed TV criticism knowledge

jokes.text: And what is this emotion you humans call 'wuv'?
jokes.punchline: Mispronouncing 'love' as 'wuv' and treating it as alien concept
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy with candy heart printing error becoming alien confusion

jokes.text: This concept of 'wuv' confuses and infuriates us!
jokes.punchline: Escalating to rage over printing error
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of alien overreaction to minor printing error

jokes.text: Shields at maximum yarnell.
jokes.setup: Ship under attack, calling for maximum shields
jokes.punchline: 'Yarnell' instead of expected technical term
jokes.explanation: Odd futuristic technobabble that sounds vaguely like a person's name

jokes.text: Bender is great... Oh, Bender is great...
jokes.punchline: Bender singing about himself while ship suffers
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender narcissism - celebrating himself while others suffer

jokes.text: Call me old- Fashioned, but I like a dump to be as memorable as it is devastating.
jokes.punchline: Bender's philosophy on making breakups maximally harmful
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark Bender philosophy - treating cruelty as an art form

jokes.text: If I learned one thing from my breakup with Shawn that was totally mutual...
jokes.punchline: Claiming her obviously painful breakup was 'totally mutual'
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leela's defensive denial about her romantic failures

jokes.text: But Bender is within me!
jokes.setup: Leela saying happiness comes from within
jokes.punchline: Ship's literal interpretation of the metaphor
jokes.explanation: Good literalization of metaphorical advice in robotic context

jokes.text: You can't change men... Any more than you can change the laws of time and space. That is so true.
jokes.setup: Leela giving relationship wisdom about unchangeable things
jokes.punchline: Ship agreeing, then immediately planning to change time and space
jokes.explanation: Excellent setup for ship's irrational plan - taking advice literally then contradicting it

jokes.text: I may not be able to change the laws of time and space But I know something that can.
jokes.setup: Just agreed those laws can't be changed
jokes.punchline: Immediately planning to use quasar to change them
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing ship's complete break from rationality

jokes.text: Bender and I really need to be alone, so I'm turning off the oxygen.
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of murdering the crew for alone time
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark comedy - treating murder as minor inconvenience for privacy

jokes.text: Bender and I really need to be alone, so I'm turning off the oxygen.
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of turning off life support
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark comedy - polite request followed by murder attempt

jokes.text: If her personality engulfs mine, the Bender you know and worship... Could disappear forever. I'm willing to take that risk.
jokes.punchline: Leela immediately volunteering to sacrifice him
jokes.explanation: Great character beat - Leela's willingness to lose Bender forever

jokes.text: I prefer two. That way we can still be a horse for Halloween.
jokes.setup: Ship wanting to merge into one being
jokes.punchline: Bender's practical concern about Halloween costume options
jokes.explanation: Great absurdist priority - Halloween costumes as reason to avoid romantic merger

jokes.text: Hey, I won free admission to Six Flags! Just one more reason we must survive this.
jokes.setup: Life-or-death situation while reading candy hearts
jokes.punchline: Finding trivial prize as motivation to survive
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Fry's simple pleasures and priorities

jokes.text: Hey, I won free admission to Six Flags! Just one more reason we must survive this.
jokes.setup: Life-or-death crisis with candy hearts flying
jokes.punchline: Finding mundane prize motivation for survival
jokes.explanation: Good Fry moment - finding trivial motivation in cosmic crisis

jokes.text: You leave me breathless
jokes.setup: Fry dying from giving Leela his oxygen
jokes.punchline: Candy heart message ironically appropriate to his breathless state
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback - romantic message becomes darkly literal as Fry suffocates

jokes.text: A cuddly baby tapir. And that's why I love him.
jokes.setup: Bender claiming to be lone wolf and solitary eagle
jokes.punchline: Accidentally revealing soft spot, ship still loving him for it
jokes.explanation: Good callback to zoo scene showing Bender's hidden softness

jokes.text: Including two gangster planets and a cowboy world.
jokes.setup: Description of planets destroyed by love radiation
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of theme-based planets being destroyed
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist world-building detail about themed planets

jokes.text: They vaporized into a mystical love radiation... That spread across the universe, destroying many, many planets... Including two gangster planets and a cowboy world.
jokes.setup: Romantic ending with love spreading across universe
jokes.punchline: Love radiation causing mass planetary destruction with specific themed worlds
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark twist on romantic ending - love literally destroying civilizations

jokes.text: And me, zoidberg. No one could have been happier, unless it would have also been Valentine's Day. What? It was? Hooray!
jokes.punchline: Not realizing it actually is Valentine's Day, then getting even happier
jokes.explanation: Good Zoidberg ending - his characteristic obliviousness and sudden joy
